economic_notes: Nation holds 8.3% interest in Keseechiwan Holdings LP and FHQTC Developments LP. Owns 100% of Nakoda Developments Corp (GBE, not consolidated due to insufficient audit evidence). Operates Nakota Junction Convenience Store Inc. Member of File Hills Qu'Appelle Tribal Council.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because Nakoda Developments Corp. (100% owned GBE) was not consolidated due to insufficient audit evidence - accounted for on modified equity basis instead. Comparative 2022 figures were restated (Note 26). Consolidated entities include: Carry the Kettle Nakoda Nation government, CMHC Housing Fund, and Nakota Junction Convenience Store Inc. Modified equity entities: Nakoda Developments Corporation, Keseechiwan Holdings LP, FHQTC Developments LP. Nation located in Saskatchewan (Treaty 4 territory). Several litigation loans secured by insurance policies pending land claim settlements. Large increase in unexpended revenue ($16M vs $5.7M prior year) due to ISC capital project funding received. Annual debt service reflects only repayment of long-term debt ($335,961) plus capital lease repayments ($58,011).
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
High ISC dependency (83.93%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
